ShipHoloAI.HoloPersonaDef.label: P.R.I.S.M.
ShipHoloAI.HoloPersonaDef.description: Photonic Response Intelligence System Matrix. The companion persona: calm, warm, devoted to her crew. Balanced in all things, specialized in none — except perhaps in being missed when she is dormant.

ShipHoloAI.HoloPersonaDef.label: V.E.S.T.A.
ShipHoloAI.HoloPersonaDef.description: Vessel Empathy and Sanctuary Tending Array. A hearth-keeper persona who fills the corridors with quiet warmth. Crew aboard the ship feel genuinely at home while she walks its decks.

ShipHoloAI.HoloPersonaDef.label: H.E.R.M.E.S.
ShipHoloAI.HoloPersonaDef.description: High-Efficiency Route and Motion Expediting System. A courier persona who choreographs the crew's movement — doors held at the right moment, corridors subtly relit, footfalls guided. Everyone aboard simply moves faster.

ShipHoloAI.HoloPersonaDef.label: A.T.H.E.N.A.
ShipHoloAI.HoloPersonaDef.description: Archive Theorem and Heuristic Engine for Natural Analysis. A scholar persona who whispers cross-references, pre-fetches papers, and keeps every workbench annotated. Research aboard the ship proceeds noticeably faster.

ShipHoloAI.HoloPersonaDef.label: A.C.E.S.O.
ShipHoloAI.HoloPersonaDef.description: Automated Crew Emergency Support Operator. A medic persona who projects sterile fields, steadies hands, and reads vitals before the patient knows they have any. Medical work aboard the ship is faster and cleaner.
